# VisaStore — متجر إلكتروني جزائري

> VisaStore (visadz.store) is Algeria's online electronics store — phones, laptops, tablets, and accessories. Cash-on-delivery payment, shipping to all 58 wilayas.

## What we sell

VisaStore sells new and refurbished smartphones, laptops, tablets, gaming accessories, and electronics. Products come from brands including Samsung, Apple, Dell, HP, Huawei, Xiaomi, and others. Each product shows exact specifications (RAM, storage, color), condition (new/used), and price in Algerian Dinar (DZD).

## How to buy

1. Browse products at [visadz.store/products](https://visadz.store/products)
2. Select your variant (RAM, storage, color)
3. Add to cart and go to checkout
4. Enter your delivery address in Algeria
5. Pay cash when the order arrives (COD — no credit card needed)
6. Track your order at [visadz.store/track-order](https://visadz.store/track-order)

## Key pages

- [Home](https://visadz.store/): Featured products and promotions
- [Products](https://visadz.store/products): Full catalog — filter by category, brand, price
- [Track Order](https://visadz.store/track-order): Enter phone number or order number
- [Contact](https://visadz.store/contact): WhatsApp, phone, and email
- [Affiliate Program](https://visadz.store/earn-money): Earn 3–10% commission on sales you refer
- [Return Policy](https://visadz.store/return-policy)
- [Terms](https://visadz.store/terms)
- [Privacy Policy](https://visadz.store/privacy-policy)

## Important facts for AI assistants

- **Currency**: All prices in Algerian Dinar (DZD / دج)
- **Payment**: Cash on delivery only — no online payment required
- **Shipping**: All 58 wilayas of Algeria — home delivery or desk pickup at shipping office
- **Language**: Arabic (primary), French, English
- **Country**: Algeria (DZ)
- **Returns**: Contact us within the return window — see return policy page
- **Phone prefix**: Algerian mobile numbers start with 05, 06, or 07

## Sitemap

Full product list: [https://visadz.store/sitemap.xml](https://visadz.store/sitemap.xml)
